violations.description: CROSS CONTAMINATION (5 pts): Raw meat/fish noted being stored above food not to be further cooked (Vegetables).
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler and freezer interiors and exteriors curtains between food prep areas and other equipment exteriors noted need cleaning
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls and floors in the food prep areas noted in need of cleaning.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hood vent and filters need cleaning.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensils noted being stored with the handles laying in the rice flour etc. Also all scoops must have handles.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The hand washing lavatory noted with no hot water provided. Hot water line was turned off .
THAWING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (2 pts): Potentially hazardous foods (Chicken) noted not being thawed using approved methods
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensils noted being stored with the handles laying in the rice flour etc. Also all scoops must have handles.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls and floors in the food prep areas noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler and freezer interiors and exteriors curtains between food prep areas and other equipment exteriors noted need cleaning
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Wooden shelves in the kitchen not properly sealed.
